expect.note: Repo has ~26 real pytest files under tests/ (test_basic.py, test_appctx.py, test_blueprints.py, test_cli.py, test_json.py, etc.). Gazelle package mode should generate py_test targets for these. examples/ and docs/ are gazelle:exclude'd, so they are out of scope.

Runs Flask's own native pytest suite under tests/. Risks: test_apps fixtures with shadowing flask.py module names, data files (templates/static/.env) needing data attrs, conftest.py fixture sharing, and native markupsafe wheel from pip.parse. If data/import wiring is incomplete this may not reach 0; tier-2/3 remain the honest floor.
